Tests that the square root of Infinity is Infinity using an assertion.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.sqrt` function when applied to the value `Infinity`. It verifies that the square root of `Infinity` is `Infinity`, which is consistent with mathematical principles. The code uses the `assert` function to ensure that the expression evaluates to `true`, indicating that the `Math.sqrt` function behaves as expected for this input. This is a narrow functionality test, focusing on a specific mathematical operation within the JavaScript environment.
